subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned toward the Abha Kingdom! The blessed leaf, Khali Khanum, doth at all times make mention of thee in the gatherings [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بملکوت ابهی ورقه مبارکه خاله خانم در جمیع اوقات ذکرت را در انجمن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
